title: ReliaPrep™ Viral TNA Miniprep System, Custom
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol extracts DNA using the ReliaPrep™ Viral TNA Miniprep System extraction kit. Proteinase K, patient sample, cell lysis buffer and isopropanol are combined with a ReliaPrep Binding Column. After 3 washes, water is added to the column to form the eluate which can then be plated. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of samples`: Specify the number of samples for this run. Samples should always be placed by column (A1, B1, C1,..,etc.). * `P20/P1000 Dispense Flow Rate`: Global control of P20 and P1000 dispense flow rate. A value of 1.0 is default, 0.5 is 50% of the default flow rate, 1.2 is 20% faster the default flow rate, etc. * `P20 Mount`: Specify which side (left or right) to mount the P20 single channel pipette. * `P1000 Mount`: Specify which side (left or right) to mount the P1000 single channel pipette. ---
steps_raw: This protocol extracts DNA using the ReliaPrep™ Viral TNA Miniprep System extraction kit. Proteinase K, patient sample, cell lysis buffer and isopropanol are combined with a ReliaPrep Binding Column. After 3 washes, water is added to the column to form the eluate which can then be plated. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of samples`: Specify the number of samples for this run. Samples should always be placed by column (A1, B1, C1,..,etc.). * `P20/P1000 Dispense Flow Rate`: Global control of P20 and P1000 dispense flow rate. A value of 1.0 is default, 0.5 is 50% of the default flow rate, 1.2 is 20% faster the default flow rate, etc. * `P20 Mount`: Specify which side (left or right) to mount the P20 single channel pipette. * `P1000 Mount`: Specify which side (left or right) to mount the P1000 single channel pipette. ---
Pro-K added to all tubes up to the number of samples on the odd columns of slot 2.
Samples are added to odd columns on slot 2.
Cell lysis buffer is added to the odd columns on slot 2.

Incubate for 10 minutes with a pause at the end of incubation. User selects "Resume" when they have populated tubes with binding column up to the number of samples on the "right side" of the tube rack on slot 2.
Isopropanol is added, mixed, and contents are transferred from odd columns to "right" side on slot 2.
3 wash steps with pauses which prompt the user to centrifuge. User puts empty tubes on the odd columns of the tube rack on slot 2.
Water is added to odd columns of the tube rack.
User places binding column in water
Water is added to binding column + water on odd columns
